programme.title: 香港早晨 及 世界观
programme.desc: 报道香港、两岸及国际重要新闻。

programme.title: 谈判专家
programme.desc: 彭国栋与简洁是「警察谈判小组」内的梦幻组合，合作从未失手。私底下，栋对洁之大女人作风却不以为然。谈判小组招募新一届谈判专家，栋与洁各持己见。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 熊树根是小型运输公司东主，与次女若水、三女心如以及长女的儿子金城安同住旧楼，惟心如与若水经常争吵，教树根哭笑不得。树根无视众人反对，力邀不修边幅的亲弟树仁搬来同住，怎料树仁竟无意间招惹了鬼魂龙璟风，令熊家出现翻天覆地的转变！

programme.title: Hands Up
programme.desc: 儿童节目《Hands Up》鼓励小朋友勇于发问，表达自我，向目标进发！吉祥物「酱汁家族」成员跟一众主持演出短剧，陪伴大家度过愉快时光。另会带来多首儿歌，让孩子们边唱边学习生活知识。

programme.title: ㇐个人去旅行
programme.desc: 厌倦了打卡式旅游？网络红人梁嘉铭(Ming仔)忠于自己，零行程、即兴自驾游，以第一视觉分享旅行日常，一贯只身「Freesty游」，发掘无数次的独行美丽！

programme.title: Holistic Way及京都念慈庵呈献: 正义女神
programme.desc: 高等法院法官言惠知调查一宗14岁少年高成彬涉嫌导致6岁男童坠亡案件时，发现其多次犯罪却因年龄未被追责。她主动降职至少年法庭裁判官通过引导教育帮助问题少年。

programme.desc: 《兄弟帮》是由一班「好兄弟」林盛斌、梁竞徽、王梓轩、范振锋及陈国峰主持的年青人清谈节目，每集邀请歌手、艺人或不同界别人士作嘉宾，进行轻松访谈，带来时下社会热话、流行文化、潮流玩意等多元化内容。

programme.title: 大梦想家

programme.desc: 熊树根是小型运输公司东主，与次女若水、三女心如以及长女的儿子金城安同住旧楼，惟心如与若水经常争吵，教树根哭笑不得。树根无视众人反对，力邀不修边幅的亲弟树仁搬来同住，怎料树仁竟无意间招惹了鬼魂龙璟风，令熊家出现翻天覆地的转变！

programme.title: Holistic Way及京都念慈庵呈献: 正义女神
programme.desc: 高等法院法官言惠知调查一宗14岁少年高成彬涉嫌导致6岁男童坠亡案件时，发现其多次犯罪却因年龄未被追责。她主动降职至少年法庭裁判官通过引导教育帮助问题少年。

programme.title: 吴邪私家笔记
programme.desc: 吴邪解读帛书地图，与三叔组队探古墓，遇怪兽、铜鱼揭三叔往事，神秘女子阿宁现身后三叔失踪，新冒险展开。

programme.title: 娱乐头条
programme.desc: 每晚紧贴香港娱乐圈的消息，以至世界各地的影视娱乐新闻，报道艺人最新动态、剧集和电影宣传、演唱会精华、颁奖礼盛况等，让大家瞬间掌握影视娱乐圈的动态和最新消息。

programme.title: 晚间新闻
programme.desc: 每晚报道香港、两岸、国际重要新闻以及体育消息，让你洞悉各地大事及体坛动向。

programme.desc: A wealthy British heiress honeymooning on a Nile cruise ship is stalked by a former friend, whose boyfriend she had stolen before making him her new husband.

programme.title: If the Shoe Pinches
programme.desc: The shoes fit, so Darrin wears them - and needs Samantha's help to get them off.

programme.desc: A wealthy British heiress honeymooning on a Nile cruise ship is stalked by a former friend, whose boyfriend she had stolen before making him her new husband.

programme.title: The Quilting
programme.desc: Grandma is determined to have a quilting for Mary Ellen to announce she's of marrying age. But Mary Ellen considers the custom insulting.

programme.title: Trophy
programme.desc: After a young woman has been raped and murdered, her body turns up in an industrial laundry facility and it isn't long before the SVU team tracks down the prime suspect.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Parking Garage / The Crew Builds A Campsite
programme.desc: The Crew helps with a parking problem when Cafe Carl's ice cream machine brings lots of cars to Builder Cove. // When Rubble's fear of the dark derails the pup's Bark Yard campout, the Crew comes up with an idea to help him enjoy the starry night.

programme.title: Tiny Dancer / The Sleepy Sun
programme.desc: Dora shows the twins a music box with a baila folklorico dancer who comes to life! Bailarina's adelita boots run away, so we need to get them back. // The sun won't set because it can't fall asleep! Dora needs to find Pillow Cloud so Sol can set.

programme.title: Tres Leches Trouble / Wizzle Wozzle Woo
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Benny have to trek through the rainforest to deliver a big, delicate tres leches cake to Benny's abuela. // Dora and the Fiesta Trio investigate a loud, strange noise that caused them to lose their instruments.

programme.title: Innovation Melting Pot / Make Up Your Mind Barbazoo
programme.desc: The Barbababies want to invent like Leonardo da Vinci. // The Barbababies must choose between going to the pool or going for a bike ride.

programme.title: Rebels / Barbascience
programme.desc: Barbidur and Barbalala become little rebels. // But who are the Barbapapa?

programme.title: The Barbababies Have Got Talent / Triple Switcheroo
programme.desc: Every barbababy is invited to show their greatest talent on stage. // Video games are fun, but you also need to know how to enjoy the nice weather!

programme.title: Vandal! / Tumbles, Where Did You Go?
programme.desc: Barbidur catches a mysterious masked vandal. // Tototutu, Barbidur's favorite little car, has mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: I'm Not A Barbababy Anymore / Roboxman
programme.desc: No! It's over! Barbidur is no longer a baby, he's a big boy now! // The barbababies are going to the hypermarket for the first time.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Treehouse / The Crew Builds A Chicken Feeder
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose's favorite tree might be off limits for climbing unless Rubble and Grandpa can come up with a solution. / The Crew build a feeder for Farmer Zoe's chickens, but when they get loose, it's up to the pups to safely rescue them.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Roller Coaster/The Crew Builds Motor A Play Space
programme.desc: When Speed Meister's rollercoaster sends a pet playdate out of control, Rubble & Crew save the day with a bigger, better, and safer coaster. // The Bark Yard safety inspection is today! But will Motor go boom and cost the Crew a gold safety star?

programme.title: Pup Pup Goose / Pup Pup and Away
programme.desc: Marshal gets a new BFF when a gosling he names "Fuzzy" takes a liking to him. // When Mayor Goodway accidentally takes off in a hot air balloon, Ryder and the Paw Patrol must make a dramatic rescue to save her and win the race!

programme.title: Pups on Ice / Pups and the Snow Monster
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol need to rescue Alex on Jakes mountain. // The pups find strange footprints in the snow on the mountain outside Adventure Bay. Everyone thinks it's a "snow monster" and it's scaring the skiers away.

programme.title: Going With The Flow / The Decoder
programme.desc: The Barbababies are bored, the rain is preventing them from playing outside. // Barbibul has created a clever decoder capable of translating the cries of animals.

programme.title: Paper Landscapes / Cowgirl
programme.desc: Barbamama and Barbapapa are surprised to see more and more billboards on the road. // Barbalala dreams of becoming a cowgirl and Barbidou is determined to help her.

programme.title: New Rocket
programme.desc: Tim tries to find a new rocket that's perfect for him.

programme.title: Babysitting
programme.desc: Tim tries to bend all the rules when Terri comes to babysit.

programme.title: Treasure
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Grandma go on the search for treasure.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Splash Park / The Crew Builds A Playroom
programme.desc: With their splash park plans in troubled waters, the pups have to get creative to cool down the town for the summer. // As the pups work on building a surprise playroom for Lucas and Lily, a squirrelly visitor causes construction complications.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A School / The Crew Builds A Waterway
programme.desc: It's the first day of school in Builder Cove... if Rubble & Crew can finish the building in time! / The pups need a construction solution to save Farmer Zoe's crops and to keep Crunchy the beaver from taking all the water!

programme.title: The Missing Magical Instruments / Mr. Banana's Big Puppet Show
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Vicky the Vicuna track down missing magic instruments to save Cloud Kingdom! // Dora rescues Boots' special banana puppet before the Golden Monkeys can get to it!

programme.title: The Flying Lion
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are excited to play with their new friend Roarian, the Flying Lion! But when Roarian loses his magical sunstone, he turns into a statue! Now it's up to Blaze and AJ to find the sunstone and restore Roarian's powers!

programme.title: Buzzy Croc / Dream House
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile worries he'll be caught between his old best friend Buzzy and his new best friend Daisy. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile's simple treehouse gets complicated when they try to add space for all their friends.

programme.title: The Barbapapa Tree / The Barbababies' birthday
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama return to the tree they were born under. It's in bad condition. They must rescue it quickly without disturbing the nearby animals. // It's the Barbababies's birthday. They all want to do something different with Barbapapa!

programme.title: Bada-Bam / The Barbamartians
programme.desc: Barbabright captured a melody from Mars. The Barbapapas build a rocket to go to the red planet. // While travelling to Mars, the Barbapapas meet a family of Barbamartians. They have no time to get acquainted when a giant plant attacks the village.

programme.title: Toy / Astrofools / Mole
programme.desc: Tim does all he can to get the new DinoStar toy. // It's a day for practical jokes, but Tim doesn't know when to stop. // Tim and Dad have to catch a troublesome mole.

programme.title: The Snow Spectacular
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ help a truck named Snowbie get to the Snow Spectacular in time.

programme.title: The Fastest of them All
programme.desc: When a greedy queen casts a spell to make a few of our friends go slow, Blaze and AJ must race her for the magical cure

programme.title: The Crew Builds An Ice Cream Shop / The Crew Fixes A Squeak
programme.desc: When a windy day derails construction on an ice cream shop, Rubble, Mix, Wheeler, and Charger are on the chase. // There's a mysterious squeak in City Hall. Mayor Greatway asks Rubble and Charger to find and fix the squeak before her big speech!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Playground / The Crew Fixes A Roof
programme.desc: After Speed Meister builds an unsafe playground, the Rubble & Crew get creative and build a whole new one with old materials. // The town Chili Cookaroo is threatened when City Hall's roof starts to cave in! Luckily, the pups know just how to fix it.

programme.title: Pups Save the Skydivers / Pups Save the Cupcakes
programme.desc: Mayor Goodway and Farmer Al are ready for a day filled with Skydiving fun, but their adventure is quickly derailed. It's Paw Patrol to the rescue! // Alex and the Mini Patrol get locked inside the flounder, the Paw Patrol dives in to save the day!

programme.title: Pups Save A Lost Gold Miner / Pups Save Uncle Otis From His Cabin
programme.desc: Uncle Otis takes a trip to a lost gold mine. After wandering off course, Ryder and the Pups must save him from the booby-trapped mine. // Uncle Otis's installs a Smart Home 3000, in his cabin, that ends up trapping Uncle Otis and Mr. Wingnut inside!

programme.title: Octo-Swiper / Tudos Juntos
programme.desc: Dora stops a frantic octopus Swiper and saves the Pearl Day Party! // Dora meets Raquel the Rock Lobster and helps her get the missing instruments back in time to play at the big music show!

programme.title: The Floor Is Guava
programme.desc: Now there's more to explore with DORA! Join the iconic exploradora in amazing adventures with friends old and new as she journeys across the wacky and wonderful Rainforest with her best friend Boots by her side.

programme.title: Treasure
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Grandma go on the search for treasure.

programme.title: Roar
programme.desc: It's the Roar Festival, and Tim wants to have the best Roar in town.

programme.title: Mammoth
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia find a lost mammoth in their house.

programme.title: Shake, Rattle and Bang
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle gives the class a music lesson. There's lots of crashing and banging at first, but it's not long before the grown-ups visit and lay down some notes of their own.

programme.title: Champion Daddy Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig loses his title as Champion Puddle Jumper during the Daddi-Olympics, so everyone helps him train to win it back at the Daddi-Olympics.

programme.title: Chatterbox
programme.desc: Peppa Pig talks far too much. Or at least so Suzy thinks. In response, Peppa decides that she is never going to talk, ever again. But this does not last for very long at all.

programme.title: Mr Fox's Van
programme.desc: When Daddy Pig needs a new watch, Mr Fox finds three grandfather clocks in the back of his van. Three clocks are much better than one. Mr Fox has everything in his van - even a chicken!

programme.title: Baby Alexander
programme.desc: Baby Alexander is too young to talk, until Peppa teaches him his first word.

programme.title: Grampy Rabbit's Lighthouse
programme.desc: Granddad Dog takes Peppa, George and Danny Dog to visit Grampy Rabbit's lighthouse.

programme.title: Miss Rabbit's Day Off
programme.desc: Miss Rabbit has hurt her ankle, so her sister and her friends offer to fill in for her at the ice cream stand, the supermarket - and everywhere else she works!

programme.title: The Secret Club
programme.desc: Suzy and Peppa start a Secret Agent Club - going on secret missions, and doing secret things. In secret. But soon everyone wants to join!

programme.title: Grampy Rabbit's Boatyard
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig needs help when his boat sinks, so Granddad Dog gives them all a lift to Grampy Rabbit's Boatyard so that the boat can be fixed.

programme.title: The Treasure Hunt / Going into the Wild
programme.desc: Mr. Strict's twins visit the barbababies. The barbababies organize a treasure hunt for the twins and enjoy the great outdoors. // The Barbapapas are off to a new adventure... in the garden. But living in nature is more complicated than they expected.

programme.title: The Fuchsia Ocean / Zero Waste
programme.desc: Chemical sprays are making the countryside rosy! The Barbapapas' build an aviary to protect sick birds. // When they see a beach covered with rubbish, the Barbapapa family decides to clean the beach and use the trash to make a miniature golf course.

programme.title: Big Help Croc / Pom Pom
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile volunteers to help too many friends with their projects all at the same time. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile invite a new friend, PomPom, to live with them.

programme.title: Blaze of Glory Part 1
programme.desc: Blaze and his driver AJ are introduced to a world of racing Monster Machines. But when a truck named Crusher uses tricks to try and win the Championship Race, Blaze will do everything he can to help his friends and beat Crusher to the finish line.

programme.title: Blaze of Glory Part 2
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are introduced to a world of racing Monster Machines. But when a truck named Crusher uses dirty tricks to try and win the Championship Race, Blaze will do everything he can to help his friends and beat Crusher to the finish line.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Giant Lemonade Stand / The Crew Builds A Wildlife Bridge
programme.desc: After the Crew builds a special lemonade stand for Lucas and Lily, a sour Speed Meister sends it rolling through Builder Cove! // Why does Crunchy the beaver cross the road? Because Rubble & Crew build a bridge to help him get to the other side!

programme.title: The Crew and Chase Are On The Case
programme.desc: There's a mystery afoot in Builder Cove! When the sculpture of all the townsfolk suddenly disappears, Chase joins Rubble & Crew to solve the case of the missing statue...and build a brand new Science Center to help investigate.

programme.title: Pups Save the Squirrels / Pups Save a Roo
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol is on a roll when squirrels stash acorns in Alex's treehouse causing it to fall onto Daring Danny's skateboard! // It's a switcheroo situation when a joey is separated from its mama. It's up to the pups to save a roo and the day!

programme.title: Pups Save a Humsquatch / Pups Save a Far Flung Flying Disc
programme.desc: Travelling Travis yelps for help when he finds a mysterious creature in trouble. The PAW Patrol heads to Foggy Bottom to save a Humsquatch! // When a robo-toy causes mayhem in Adventure Bay, Ryder knows who to call to save the far flung flying disc!

programme.title: Paper Landscapes / Cowgirl
programme.desc: Barbamama and Barbapapa are surprised to see more and more billboards on the road. // Barbalala dreams of becoming a cowgirl and Barbidou is determined to help her.

programme.title: Innovation Melting Pot / Make Up Your Mind Barbazoo
programme.desc: The Barbababies want to invent like Leonardo da Vinci. // The Barbababies must choose between going to the pool or going for a bike ride.

programme.title: Rocket Race / Magic / Parents
programme.desc: Tommy is in a Rocket Race, Tim supports his brother. // Tim distracts Tia when Tusky is in the washing machine. // The kids become the parents and the parents become the kids.

programme.title: Boots / Moon Parrot / Tailball
programme.desc: Tim tries out some new rocket boots which soon fly out of control. // Tim, Tommy and Tia bird-sit the Bronte's MoonParrot. // Tim, Tommy and Tia take on their parents at Tailball.

programme.title: A Pinata For Mami / Invisi-Swiper
programme.desc: Dora's family makes a pinata for Mami's birthday, but it flies away! They have to get it back safe before Mami arrives. / Swiper swipes an invisibility blanket! Now Invisi-Swiper is swiping everything, and it's up to Dora and Boots to stop him.

programme.title: Isa's Royal Garden Party / Sammy's Surprise
programme.desc: The Queen of Reptiles is visiting Isa, but the garden's a mess! Dora helps her get everything ready in time for La Reina's visit. / Dora meets Sammy the Sloth, who needs to get to Day Camp on time so he can show everyone a special surprise.

programme.title: World Book Day
programme.desc: It is World Book Day at playgroup but Peppa has so many favourite books she just cannot decide which to go as!

programme.title: Children's Festival
programme.desc: Peppa, George, Mummy and Daddy go on a trip to the children's festival where there is lots of singing, dancing, making crafts and listening to stories.

programme.title: Muddy Festival
programme.desc: Peppa and her family sleep overnight in a tent and wake up to find the whole festival is covered in mud. Peppa is thrilled!

programme.title: Strawberries
programme.desc: Grandpa and Granny Pig have been growing strawberries to make jam, but the birds have eaten them all! Instead, they go with Peppa and George to Miss Rabbit's strawberry farm.

programme.title: Grandpa Pig's Birthday
programme.desc: It is Grandpa Pig's birthday and the family go out for a special birthday meal. Peppa has never been to a restaurant before.

programme.title: The Petting Farm
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends visit Mrs Badger's petting farm where they meet lots of little animals and learn it's important to wash your hands.

programme.title: Pizza! Pizza!
programme.desc: Peppa and her family have a lot of fun preparing and choosing food to make their own pizzas. Peppa likes making pizzas!

programme.title: Robots in Space
programme.desc: When Space Commander Megan is marooned on Pluto, our robot heroes will race through wormholes, shoot past ice volcanoes, and blast straight through an asteroid field to bring their new friend back home.

programme.title: Pups Save a Sniffle / Pups and the Ghost Cabin
programme.desc: A sick day for the PAW Patrol? While Rubble and Ryder search for Farmer Al's runaway pigs, Marshall cares for his sniffly pup pals! // First Rubble's lunch disappears, then Jake's lunchbox walks away! Could it be a ghost?!

programme.title: Pups Save a Farmerless Farm
programme.desc: Bears are asleep all over town! The PAW Patrol must work quietly to save the bears and return them to their cave.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Hotel / The Crew Builds A Hiking Trail
programme.desc: Builder Cove gets its first hotel when Farmer Zoe's cousin Hadley comes to visit. But will Hadley approve of the new hotel?// After a hiking trail mix-up confuses everyone going to Mr. Ducky-Doo's birthday party, the pups help them get back on track.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Solar-Powered Bus
programme.desc: When Speed Meister steals Rubble & Crew's bus, the pups have to stop it in time for Sierra Sparkle's big concert!

programme.title: Finders Keepers / Dancing Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile takes the motto "finders, keepers" a bit too far. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile arrange a dance performance for Mrs. Flores after they find her old dance shoes.

programme.title: Relay Tales / The Barbababies' World
programme.desc: Barbalib, Barbalala and Barbabelle take turns as narrators to tell a story, each one bringing a very personal touch to it. // The Barbapapa family spends a day at the beach. Divided into 2 teams, the barbababies fight over a sandy peninsula.

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: Episode 1
programme.desc: Hosted by Pat Sajak and Vanna White, "Celebrity Wheel of Fortune" welcomes celebrities to solve word puzzles for a chance to win up to $1 million. All of the money won goes to a charity of their choice.

programme.title: Holy K.I.T.T.
programme.desc: Thanksgiving finds Murray (Jeff Garlin) and his brother (guest star Dan Fogler) fighting over their Knight Rider fandom. Beverly (Wendi McLendonCovey) and Bill Lewis (David Koechner) begin a turkey cookoff.

programme.title: Episode 15
programme.desc: Mickey Fox, a sheriff in Edgewater and stepsister of Cal Fire’s division chief Sharon Leone, must balance the demands of law enforcement with the complexities of motherhood, politics and a past that won’t stay buried.

programme.title: Episode 15
programme.desc: Bode Leone works alongside elite firefighters from Cal Fire and former friends, battling largescale wildfires while navigating his complex past and personal relationships.

programme.title: Episode 3
programme.desc: Fran presents Ria with a promising career opportunity, but concerning discoveries raise questions about her true intentions.

programme.title: Entertainment Tonight
programme.desc: The foremost authority on breaking entertainment news since its debut, ENTERTAINMENT TONIGHT is the No. 1 syndicated entertainment newsmagazine in the world.

programme.title: Episode 1
programme.desc: Hosted by Pat Sajak and Vanna White, "Celebrity Wheel of Fortune" welcomes celebrities to solve word puzzles for a chance to win up to $1 million. All of the money won goes to a charity of their choice.

programme.title: The Lost Girls of Edgewater County
programme.desc: To save one of her own, Sheriff Mickey Fox launches a raceagainsttime investigation that exposes long buried secrets and a chilling pattern haunting Edgewater County.

programme.title: Making Things Go Boom
